title: The AI Ethics and Public Policy Lifecycle
description: A flowchart illustrating the continuous, interdependent cycle between ethical principles, AI development, public policy, and societal impact.
relationships: Ethical Principles inform both AI Development and Public Policy creation. Public Policy regulates and guides AI Development. The resulting AI System Deployment creates a Societal Impact. This Impact is measured and provides Feedback, which is used to refine Ethical Principles and Public Policy, restarting the cycle.
